scope: DeepSeek-V4-Flash S=4096 MoE W2 dgrad grouped GEMM probe
read: The CK-Tile custom-config wrapper can run the Flash compact W2 dgrad shape, but every tested custom tile is slower than both padded torch.bmm(out=) and the best AITER compact GMM config. This keeps the current MoE bottleneck classified as small/ragged grouped GEMM efficiency rather than dispatch-only glue, but CK-Tile example wrapping is not the next promotion path.
next_actions: Keep padded torch.bmm(out=) as the retained Flash W2 dgrad baseline for now.
Pursue a shape-specialized compact grouped training GEMM path only if it improves MFMA utilization beyond the example CK-Tile wrapper.
Prioritize fused MoE backward/TileLang or CK-Tile work that also reduces layout traffic instead of only swapping the grouped-GEMM backend.
